name: World of Screw
author: Poki
description: World of Screw is a bright and colorful puzzle game where you strategically pull apart fun objects by removing the little screws stuck in it. Make sure you’re picking the right colors, or else your boxes will fill up quickly! Can you collect all the screws? How to play World of Screw? Click on the screws to remove them from the object, and drag the screen look around. Make sure the screws you’re pulling match the colors on the boxes, or you might run out of space! Who created World of Screw? World of Screw is created by Seal Unicorn Games. Play our other games on Poki : Misland , Blocky Out , Hexellent , Fluffy Out , Dual Cat , Dual Cat: Max and Rusher Crusher ! How can I play World of Screw for free? You can play World of Screw for free on Poki. Can I play World of Screw on mobile devices and desktop? World of Screw can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
